title: Prep for FACS on blood samples
steps: Collect blood into EDTA coated tubes
Transfer 50ul into clean tube - include 1 unstained ***mix from several mice to have 50ul for unstained ctrl tube
Add 1ml ACK, incubate at RT for 7 min, centrifuge 5’ 350g
Resuspend pellet in FACS buffer + antibody mix
Incubate in dark for 15’ on ice
Resuspend in 300ul FACS Buffer + calcein blue
creator: Grace Burgin
